caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with bold text on it. The setting appears to be a casual studio environment, with framed photographs and memorabilia adorning the walls behind him. To his right, there is a clothing store display with mannequins dressed in various outfits, suggesting that the recording might be taking place in a multi-purpose space that combines retail and media production. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly discussing topics related to business, entrepreneurship, or personal experiences, as indicated by the context of the setting and the nature of the podcast.
